prompt_latex: A graph has an open dot at $-11$, an open dot at $-8$, and shading between them. Which interval is shown?
solution_latex: Between $-11$ and $-8$ gives one bounded interval. Closed dots use brackets and open dots use parentheses, so the interval is $(-11,-8)$.
